scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace=users" "npm run dev --workspace=tickets" "npm run dev --workspace=groups" "npm run dev --workspace=apigateway"
scripts.start: concurrently "npm run start --workspace=users" "npm run start --workspace=tickets" "npm run start --workspace=groups" "npm run start --workspace=apigateway"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --workspace=users && npm install --workspace=tickets && npm install --workspace=groups && npm install --workspace=apigateway
